notes: Verbatim subset of the official KoboToolbox Primary API (KPI /api/v2) OpenAPI 3.0.3 schema published at https://kf.kobotoolbox.org/api/v2/schema/?format=json. Subset to the 8 endpoints the adaptor exercises: getForms -> GET /api/v2/assets/ (asset_type=survey); getSubmissions -> GET /api/v2/assets/{uid}/data/; getDeploymentInfo -> GET /api/v2/assets/{uid}/deployment/; plus generic http.* targets: retrieve asset, retrieve/list submissions, submission validation_status, bulk data PATCH (assets/{uid}/data/bulk/), and assets/metadata. Only application/json content kept (xml/xlsx variants stripped). All response schemas and their transitive component refs retained verbatim (Asset, DataResponse and its supplemental-details tree, PaginatedAssetList, PaginatedDataResponseList, DeploymentResponse, etc.). Server base is the Global instance; the EU instance (https://eu.kobotoolbox.org) shares the same API surface. upstreamFormat noted as openapi-3.1 per allowed enum though the source declares 3.0.3.
